summary: The conformance-evidence freshness correction does not change the prior four-role acceptance verdict. The only tracked candidate delta from 064dd1f6 is the Architecture baseline paragraph; its current-main and current-HEAD counts match the checked artifacts and fresh conformance run.

architecture_conformance.reason: The refreshed Architecture paragraph exactly matches both artifacts: total violations remain 86. Relative to latest main, one undeclared dependency replaces one orphan; the total and budget count do not regress.

planning_spec/product_requirement.reason: The corrected Architecture claim now accurately describes the latest main/current conformance relationship while preserving Story AC-1 through AC-8 and the canonical closure requirements.

implementation/code_spec_alignment.reason: No implementation source changed. The previously inspected guarded-run, runtime adapter/connector, independent-review, and safe-action boundaries remain aligned with the Spec.

test_plan/unit_integration.reason: Fresh strict-HEAD focused contract suite passed 144/144, including typed stops, separate read-only review, cancellation/timeout containment, current-head guards, repair/re-review, and forbidden external-action rejection.
test_plan/unit_integration.command: node --test test/agent-runtime-adapter.test.js test/agent-runtime-connectors.test.js test/one-command-pr-ready-closure.test.js test/independent-review-orchestrator.test.js test/safe-action-orchestrator.test.js test/scope-boundary-gate.test.js

runtime/runtime_contract.reason: Fresh strict-HEAD public CLI E2E passed all four scenarios: managed-worktree implementation/review/repair/final prepare, typed stop/resume, persisted runtime/decision/verification recovery, and explicit external-authority/predecessor closure.

pr_readiness_boundary.reason: This is an independent acceptance rebind. It does not refresh the Gate DAG or authorize PR creation, merge, or waiver; pr-prepare remains the readiness authority.

reviewer_assertion: No tracked file was changed by this review; only this ignored QA transcript was added.
